risk: 400 VDC protection or arc risk is not accepted by reviewer
treatment: produce fault selectivity and arc-flash studies

risk: BESS supplier lacks acceptable safety evidence
treatment: require supplier fire data emergency response and authority review

risk: site has only one fibre route or carrier
treatment: complete fibre route diversity plan and carrier onboarding

risk: cooling design depends on scarce water
treatment: select dry or hybrid cooling and drought mode

risk: local operators are not ready for 24/7 procedure discipline
treatment: complete training drills MOP SOP EOP and staffing plan

risk: critical components have no second source
treatment: run supplier audit and second-source plan

risk: audit evidence is insufficient for public-sector buyer
treatment: maintain control evidence register and management review
implement staged adapter stubs and integration tests
